name: cc-component-library-monorepo
description: Component library platform for CC ecommerce - Geist-inspired design system

scripts.build: cd packages/design-tokens && pnpm run build && cd ../ui-library && pnpm run build && cd ../showcase && pnpm run build
scripts.lint: cd packages/design-tokens && pnpm run lint && cd ../ui-library && pnpm run lint
scripts.type-check: cd packages/design-tokens && pnpm run type-check && cd ../ui-library && pnpm run type-check
